The Biology of Performance
Every intervention begins
with understanding the mechanism.

Not trends. Not shortcuts. Structured, referenced knowledge you can act on.

The Optimised Series occupies the middle ground between impenetrable clinical textbooks and engagement-driven wellness content. Each volume gives the informed reader enough mechanism to understand why an intervention works, enough evidence to know how confidently it can be recommended, and enough protocol to act on it safely.

01
Mechanism
Every protocol begins with biology. Understand the why before the how — so you can adapt intelligently rather than follow blindly.
02
Evidence
Claims are graded by confidence. Primary research over secondary sources. Signal over noise — always.
03
Protocol
Actionable frameworks you can implement immediately. From daily practice to advanced programming — structured, not vague.
04
Risk Literacy
Honest about what is known, what is speculative, and what is dangerous. The decisions are always yours.
The Collection

Seven Volumes.
One System.

The complete evidence-based guide to building muscle, transforming body composition, and training for longevity — from mechanisms to programming.

Energy · Protein · Pattern · Gut

Sleep, Rest & Recovery
Sleep · Recovery · Adaptation
Sleep is the foundation everything else is built on. Master your circadian biology, recovery protocols, and the science of true rest.

Hormones
Signal · Balance · Decade · Repair
Your hormonal environment controls almost everything. This volume maps the endocrine system and your options for optimising it across every decade of life.
£9.99 Buy Now
Hot & Cold
Adaptation · Resilience · Recovery
Heat and cold are two of the most powerful underused interventions available. This volume covers the science, protocols, and safety of thermic exposure.
£9.99 Buy Now
Cardiovascular Training
Heart · Engine · Decade · Mile
Cardiovascular training matters more than almost anything else for longevity. This volume covers the heart, VO₂ max, zone training, and programming for life.
£9.99 Buy Now
Peptide Edition
Performance · Recovery · Longevity
The frontier of performance and recovery. A rigorous guide to peptides — what they are, the evidence, sourcing safely, and protocols used at the cutting edge.
